name: CEL_PROGRAMS_B
description: MLS base table to hold details of celebrate programs.

columns.Name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a celebrate program

columns.Name: TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates type of program

columns.Name: SUBTYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates subtype of program

columns.Name: AWARD_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates type of award

columns.Name: VISIBILITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates visibility of the awards and recognitions through the program

columns.Name: TIME_UNIT_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates time unit of program

columns.Name: TIME_UNIT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Time unit count for recurring programs

columns.Name: TRIGGER_TIME_UNIT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Trigger in advance time count

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates the start date for seniority

columns.Name: POINTS_RANGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates range of points

columns.Name: POINTS_MINIMUM
columns.Comments: Minimum value allowed for points

columns.Name: POINTS_MAXIMUM
columns.Comments: Maximum value allowed for points

columns.Name: POINTS_INCREMENT
columns.Comments: Increment allowed for points

columns.Name: OWNERS_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that indicates if owners are enabled for the program

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Program start date

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Program end date

columns.Name: USE_POINTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that identifies if program uses points

columns.Name: SENDER_LIMIT_MAXIMUM
columns.Comments: Maximum number of recognitions/awards per sender

columns.Name: RECEIVER_LIST_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates the list of receivers

columns.Name: RECOGNITION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which recognition/award is to be sent

columns.Name: NOMINATION_END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date for nominations

columns.Name: SELECTION_END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date for selection of winners

columns.Name: WINNERS_TOTAL
columns.Comments: Total number of winners

columns.Name: WINNERS_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that indicates if winner selection is enabled for the program

columns.Name: ALLOW_VISIBILITY_CHANGE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that indicates if visibility options can be modified for a program by users

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a questionnaire

columns.Name: QSTNR_VERSION_NUM
columns.Comments: Version number of the questionnaire
